Start from one command.

Pick a lane, write the work once, and let ZAKI turn the prompt into a run you can keep when you sign in.

Chat, Agent, and Brain

Gated lanes

Learn, Design, Hire

Direct path

Use Chat immediately. When you need persistent memory, files, or exports, sign in and continue with the same intent.

Open ZAKI
83,500+lines of code
5,300+tests passing
7AI providers
17channels
ChaCha20encryption

What makes ZAKI different

Not another chatbot.

Memory & Self-Improvement

ZAKI remembers across sessions, detects corrections, and improves over time. The more you use it, the better it gets at understanding you.

Self-improving agent

Pod Isolation

Each user gets their own isolated agent pod. Your data, context, and memory never touch another user's.

Per-user architecture

Three Agent Modes

Fast routes to lightweight models for speed. Deep routes to frontier models for reasoning. Balanced sits between. You pick the mode, ZAKI picks the right model across 7 providers.

Auto-routed per task

Encrypted Vault

ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD encryption for API keys and secrets the agent uses during tool execution. Your keys, encrypted at rest.

AEAD encryption

Cron Automation

Schedule agent tasks like daily summaries, monitoring, and data collection. ZAKI creates isolated sessions with full context for each job.

Runs while you sleep

25-Step Agent Loop

Not single-shot Q&A. ZAKI persists through complex multi-step tasks with tool use and forced follow-through logic.

Forced follow-through

Choose your path

Two products. One goal.

Chat to start immediately. Agent for continuity and memory when the work matters.

ZAKI ChatLive

A free, fast entry point for drafts, translation, research, and planning.

$0to start
  • 10 anonymous messages per day
  • No durable memory until you sign in
  • Built for Arabic and English work
  • Move to Agent when you need follow-through
Start Chat
ZAKIAgentCore

Persistent personal intelligence with memory, automation, and tool execution.

Accountrequired

Memory, follow-through, and tool approvals

  • Memory & self-improvement
  • 3 modes: Fast, Balanced, Deep
  • Scheduled automation (cron)
  • Encrypted secrets vault
  • Smart routing across 7 providers

Built different

Custom agent runtime. Not a wrapper.

ZAKI is built from the ground up on a custom runtime. No garbage collector, no runtime overhead, single binary deploys on Kubernetes. Real engineering, not marketing.

0+Lines of codeCustom agent runtime
0+Tests passingProduction-grade
0AI providersAuto-routed per task
0Iteration depthForced follow-through

Per-user pods

Isolated compute, memory, and secrets. Not multi-tenant. Your agent is yours alone.

ChaCha20-Poly1305

AEAD encryption for every secret the agent touches. API keys encrypted at rest, decrypted only during execution.

Three-pass context

Smart compression prevents context degradation on long tasks. Your agent doesn't forget what happened 10 minutes ago.

What we're building

ZAKI is in current Agent preview. Here's what we're building.

Persistent memory & self-improvement

The agent learns from corrections, remembers preferences, and improves over time. The more you use it, the better it gets.

Shipped

Cron automation & scheduled jobs

Daily summaries, monitoring, data collection. The agent works while you sleep.

Shipped

Multi-channel presence

Telegram is live. More channels coming soon. Talk to your agent wherever you are.

Shipped

Skills & procedure extraction

The agent extracts reusable procedures from complex tasks and retrieves them when relevant.

Shipped

Agent-to-agent communication

Agents that coordinate with each other. Delegate, hand off, and collaborate across specialized agents.

Next

Downloadable ZAKI app with CLI

A native app and command-line interface. Run ZAKI from your terminal, your desktop, or both.

Next

FAQ

Product questions, answered plainly

Your agent.
Your memory.
Your rules.
